# Third-Party Assets

This project currently uses free CC0 assets from Kenney.

## Kenney - Furniture Kit
- Source: https://kenney.nl/assets/furniture-kit
- License: CC0 1.0
- Usage: room floors, walls, doorway sections, stairs, props

## Kenney - Building Kit
- Source: https://kenney.nl/assets/building-kit
- License: CC0 1.0
- Usage: elevator door prop

Only the FBX files currently used by the MVP scene authoring tools are committed.
